info.title: GOBT Pizza — Backend API
info.description:
Complete REST API for GOBT Pizza ordering system. Includes authentication (Gmail OTP), menu browsing, order placement, Razorpay payments, refunds, customer support, and admin panel.

## Auth Flow
1. `POST /auth/send-otp` → receive OTP on email
2. `POST /auth/register` or `POST /auth/login` → get `accessToken`
3. Use `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` on protected routes

## Admin Auth
- `POST /admin/auth/login` with email + password → get admin JWT
- Use same `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Get it from /auth/login or /admin/auth/login

distance_km.description: Only present when lat/lng query params sent

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the given email address. Rate limited to 3 requests/minute. OTP expires in 10 minutes.

429.description: Too many OTP requests. Wait 1 minute.

post.description: Creates account. Mobile number is mandatory. Verifies OTP before creating user.

409.description: User already exists with this email or mobile

post.description: Login for existing users. Send OTP first via /auth/send-otp.

get.description: Pass latitude and longitude to get distance_km for each branch, sorted nearest first.
Returns the single closest branch using Haversine distance formula.
Returns active categories sorted by sort_order. e.g. Veg Pizzas, Non-Veg Pizzas, Combos, Sides, Beverages, Desserts.
Returns full product with sizes, crust options, available toppings, avg rating, and recent reviews.

post.description: Returns price breakdown before placing order. Use this to show user the final amount.
Creates the order with all items, toppings, and coupon in a single DB transaction. Returns order_number and total.

get.description: Full order detail including items, toppings, status history, and payment info.

post.description: Only allowed for 'pending' or 'confirmed' status. Once in 'preparing', cancellation is time-limited.

post.summary: Get cart items from past order
post.description: Returns the items array from a past order so Flutter can pre-fill the cart for reordering.
Step 1 of payment. Creates Razorpay order and returns razorpay_order_id to open in Flutter SDK. For COD, confirms order directly.
Step 2. Verify HMAC-SHA256 signature from Razorpay. Marks order as paid and confirmed on success.
Handles payment.captured and refund.processed events. Configure this URL in Razorpay dashboard. Verifies webhook signature internally.
User can request refund for cancelled or delivered orders that were paid online. Only one request allowed per order.

example.message: Refund request submitted. Processing within 3-5 business days.

post.description: Checks if coupon is valid for the current order value and user. Returns calculated discount.

data.description: Welcome offer - 50% off on first order

400.description: Invalid / expired / min order not met / already used

post.description: Only allowed for products from delivered orders. One rating per product per order.

get.description: Returns last 50 notifications with unread count.

message.example: I ordered Margherita but received Pepperoni.

get.summary: Get ticket with full message thread

message.example: I can share the photo of wrong order.

post.description: Admin uses email + password. Default: admin@gobt.com / Admin@123

get.summary: Get invoice data for an order
get.description: Returns GST-ready invoice breakdown — CGST + SGST split, all items, invoice number.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or mobile

post.description: Approve triggers actual Razorpay refund API call. Reject marks as failed with note.

404.description: Refund not found or already processed

post.description: Admin can reply and optionally update ticket status in the same call.

message.example: We have raised this with the delivery team. Expect resolution in 24 hours.
